name: Risotto with Saffron
recipeInstructions:
1. In a medium saucepan, bring the chicken stock, white wine, and saffron to a simmer.
2. In a separate saucepan, heat the olive oil. Add the garlic and onion and sauté for 3 minutes.
3. Add the rice and stir over low heat until lightly toasted, about 6 minutes.
4. Gradually add a half cup of the simmering stock mixture to the rice, stirring constantly, allowing the liquid to be absorbed before adding more stock.
5. Continue adding the remaining simmering stock, one half cup at a time, always letting the rice absorb the liquid before adding more stock.
6. Cook for about 30 minutes until all the stock has been added and the rice is creamy and tender.
7. Season with salt and pepper to taste. Stir in the grated Parmesan cheese and garnish as desired.
